meanings.definition: exert a force with a heavy weight
examples: The snow bore down on the roof

meanings.definition: contract the abdominal muscles during childbirth to ease delivery
to make a rush at or sudden attack upon, as in battle
examples: he saw Jess charging at him with a pitchfork
The lectures bore down on the political background

meanings.definition: exert a force or cause a strain upon
examples: This tax bears down on the lower middle class
